text:
Created attachment 235486
patch

This is a port of the QSchematic library. A Qt/C++ library providing widgets for drawing diagrams within Qt applications.

Passes portlint.
Tested with poudriere-testport on:
  - 12.3 amd64
  - 13.0 amd64
  - 13.0 i386
  - 13.1 amd64
  - 13.1 i386
